meta.target: all D >= 4, plateau (total gain < 1 over 2 iterations)

baseline.notes: Fonts: Space Grotesk (generic SaaS feel). Decision log entries at .72rem — too small to read. Beat-tags in --dim color (#445a78) — invisible. Verdict card bland, no visual activation. Money counters inside dark pupil — hard to see.

iterations.target_dimension: D4 (Craft) + user feedback: fonts and color schema
iterations.hypothesis: Replace Space Grotesk with Barlow Condensed (tactical, condensed = precision + density) and improve color contrast. Larger decision log entries with bordered badges.
changes: Font: Space Grotesk → Barlow Condensed 800 weight

iterations.hypothesis: Beat-tags in --dim are invisible; brightening to --muted makes the 3-beat arc legible on scroll. Net-bug counters need backdrop to pop against gecko eye photo.
changes: Beat-tag separator: neutral gradient → cyan rgba(76,201,255,.22) (spend color — thematic)
Net-bug: added semi-transparent backdrop (rgba(4,7,13,.7)) + blur + larger text (.lbl .58rem, .val 1.2rem)

iterations.target_dimension: D3 (The demo as proof) — verdict card
iterations.hypothesis: The verdict card shows '$0' with no visual change when the sim completes. Adding a .done class with gold border + animation + larger amt (3.2rem) makes the economic win dramatic.
changes: CSS: .verdict.done — gold border, box-shadow glow, verdict-in animation
JS: onFinish() adds .done class; onLoad() removes it and resets verdict text

iterations.hypothesis: Controls are unlabeled as discovery tools. Adding a ctrl-guide bar explaining what each toggle REVEALS transforms them from 'buttons' to 'instruments for exploration'.
changes: HTML: ctrl-guide bar below con-bar with three hints
CSS: .ctrl-guide styling (ff-m, .66rem, dim/muted colors, green accents)

status: CHECKPOINT — all D >= 4 achieved after iteration 4. Gain over last 2 iterations: 1.5. Not yet plateau (<1). Awaiting human decision on whether to continue toward D5.
